title: cotyledon umbilicus-veneris subsp. praealta
intro: Cotyledon umbilicus-veneris subsp. praealta, commonly known as the "hairy-leaved Venidium" or "praealta," is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Cotyledon umbilicus-veneris subsp. praealta include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or topical ointments, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
